message:
feat(core): add Complex64 and Complex128 dtype support

- Add num-complex dependency and Complex64/Complex128 type aliases in ft-core
- Extend DType enum with Complex64 (8 bytes) and Complex128 (16 bytes) variants
- Add is_complex() predicate and update promote/promote_types to follow
  PyTorch semantics (Complex64+F64 -> Complex128, real+complex -> complex)
- Add TensorStorage::Complex64/Complex128 variants with accessor methods,
  to_f64_vec/to_f32_vec extract real parts for complex storage
- Enable DenseTensor creation and to_dtype casting for complex dtypes
  (real -> complex sets imaginary part to zero)
- Add CPU kernels for complex ops: real, imag, conj, abs, angle, add, mul,
  div, and from_real_imag construction
- Guard all dispatch functions (unary, reduction, pow, clamp, norm, sort,
  topk, join, addmm, addmv) with early rejection of complex dtypes
- Handle complex in ft-serialize: reject complex for SafeTensors dtype
  mapping, add byte serialization for the View trait impl
- Comprehensive tests for dtype properties, promotion rules, storage,
  tensor creation, casting, and all complex CPU kernels

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -311,6 +311,7 @@ name = "ft-core"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "half",

 ]

  "windows-sys 0.61.2",
 ]
 
+[[package]]

+checksum = "73f88a1307638156682bada9d7604135552957b7818057dcef22705b4d509495"
+dependencies = [
+ "num-traits",
+]

 [[package]]
 name = "num-traits"
 version = "0.2.19"
